description_long: This is a classic submachine gun with a robust, elongated black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by polished dark wooden furniture on the foregrip, pistol grip, and fixed stock. The weapon features a prominent detachable box magazine inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard. The wooden stock is thick and contoured, providing stability and comfort for the shooter, while the foregrip is similarly crafted for a secure hold. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the receiver and barrel, aiding in target acquisition. The overall design is utilitarian yet iconic, with a blend of metal and wood that suggests durability and historical significance.
description: A vintage submachine gun with a black metal body, dark wooden stock, and foregrip, featuring a detachable box magazine and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, foregrip, and the box magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, foregrip, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
